site.name: Hurghada Animal Shelter
site.tagline: Building a safe haven for stray animals in Hurghada, Egypt

home.heroTitle: Help Us Build a Shelter for Hurghada's Stray Animals
home.heroSubtitle: Every animal deserves safety, food, and medical care. Join Ahmed Fathi in creating Hurghada's first community-funded animal shelter.
home.card1Desc: Your donation directly feeds the animals in our care.
home.card2Desc: Vaccinations, checkups, and emergency care for strays.
home.card3Desc: Kennels, fencing, water stations, and beds for the shelter.
home.ctaText: No amount is too small. Your contribution brings us one step closer to opening the shelter doors.
home.noAnimals: Meet our animals soon — profiles coming!

about.title: About Ahmed Fathi
about.subtitle: Lawyer, Animal Advocate, Founder
about.bio1: Ahmed Fathi is a practicing lawyer based in Hurghada, Egypt. He has spent years witnessing the suffering of stray animals on the streets — dogs, cats, and donkeys without food, water, or medical care.
about.bio2: As a lawyer, Ahmed understands the legal framework needed to establish a legitimate, registered shelter. He has secured a plot of land and is working with local veterinarians to ensure proper medical standards.
about.bio3: This campaign is 100% volunteer-run. Every pound goes directly to construction, food, and medical supplies. Ahmed publishes all receipts and expenses publicly.
about.cred1: Licensed lawyer in Egypt (Bar Association member)
about.cred3: Partnered with local veterinarians in Hurghada
about.cred4: 10+ years of community service in Red Sea governorate
about.visionText: A permanent, staffed shelter that rescues, rehabilitates, and rehomes stray animals. With your help, we can make Hurghada a model for animal welfare in Egypt.

getInvolved.title: Get Involved
getInvolved.subtitle: There are many ways to help — not just donations.
getInvolved.donateText: Your contribution goes directly to shelter construction, animal food, and medical care. All transactions are publicly tracked.
getInvolved.volunteerText: We need hands-on help in Hurghada: feeding, cleaning, construction, and administrative support. If you're local or visiting, reach out!
getInvolved.shareText: Word of mouth is our strongest tool. Share the campaign with your friends, family, and social networks. Every share brings us closer to our goal.
getInvolved.partnerText: Are you a business, NGO, or influencer? Partnerships help us reach more people and provide better care. Let's work together.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out anytime.
contact.whatsappHint: Available daily 9 AM — 9 PM Egypt time
